_comment: Curated public-domain EPUBs fetched on demand by fetch.py into _fetched/ (gitignored). The works are public domain; provenance/licensing noted per entry. Standard Ebooks dedicate their productions to the public domain (CC0); Project Gutenberg files carry the PG trademark + license boilerplate (permissive redistribution). Edit freely; fetch.py skips entries already present.

books.title: David Copperfield
books.author: Charles Dickens
books.tests: clean, well-structured EPUB3 baseline; large novel; the 'do not break valid files' case

books.title: David Copperfield
books.author: Charles Dickens
books.license: Public-domain text; file carries Project Gutenberg trademark/license boilerplate
books.tests: older auto-generated structure to contrast against the Standard Ebooks edition of the same work

books.title: Dubliners
books.author: James Joyce
books.tests: conventional Joyce prose — the 'repair normally' counterpart to Finnegans Wake's intentional non-sense

books.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
books.author: Lewis Carroll
books.license: Public-domain text; file carries Project Gutenberg trademark/license boilerplate
books.tests: small illustrated edition; coined words ('Jabberwocky' vocabulary) as a coinage-vs-defect check
